title: Screaming Unlocked Hoppers
body:
# Screaming Unlocked Hoppers
This mod allows you to hear that there is an unlocked hopper somewhere. It will be especially useful to confirm 100% hopper lock in the storage system.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gxgE0eIx/images/10637910cfe0fa71c2c181751135b735fd0a42bf.png)
### Usage:
- By default the mod is off, to unlocked hoppers to make themselves known you need to press `F8` (changes in the control settings)
- Pressing the hotkey above the hotbar shows which state the mod switches to
### Requires:
- [Carpet mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) is required for correct operation
  - In the world you need to write `/carpet blockStateSyncing true`
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### Credits:
This mod is based on [Screaming Locked Hoppers](https://modrinth.com/mod/screaming-locked-hoppers) mod
